title: Scythes Vanilla Pack
description: This resource pack brings scythes to Minecraft in a clean and immersive way, keeping everything fully vanilla while adding a darker, more medieval fantasy vibe to your weapons.
body:
# **Vanilla Scythes Pack — Scythes in Minecraft**

Have you ever wished Minecraft had scythes as real weapons, but without installing mods, loaders, or anything that could affect compatibility?

This resource pack adds scythes to Minecraft in a clean and immersive way, keeping the game completely vanilla.

![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8289245a4025a729747855bc5cf36db6bb59f1ea_0.webp)

### Vanilla (CIT)

It uses a simple method:
Renaming items in an anvil. In this case, you rename specific swords using the correct scythe name, and the sword will visually transform into a scythe.

### Vanilla (change)

This method changes normal swords into scythes by default.

### Vanilla (Datapack)

This version of the texture pack is only meant to provide visual functionality for the datapack.

**Pack content (v1.2):**
- Wooden Scythe (Wooden Sword)
- Stone Scythe (Stone Sword)
- Copper Scythe (Copper Sword)
- Iron Scythe (Iron Sword)
- Golden Scythe (Golden Sword)
- Diamond Scythe (Diamond Sword)
- Netherite Scythe (Netherite Sword)
- Scythe (Mace)
